---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug in OnionClaw™
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: JacobJandon
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Which script?**
- [ ] check_tor.py
- [ ] renew.py
- [ ] search.py
- [ ] fetch.py
- [ ] ask.py
- [ ] check_engines.py
- [ ] pipeline.py

**To reproduce**
```bash
python3 SCRIPT.py [args]
```

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened. Include the full error/traceback.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11]
- OnionClaw version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Tor version: [e.g. 0.4.8 — run `tor --version`]
- OpenClaw version (if applicable): [e.g. 0.3.0]
- LLM provider: [e.g. anthropic / openai / none]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
